name: Gatsby
description: A React-based static site generator that uses GraphQL to pull data from multiple sources. Gatsby produces highly optimized static sites with excellent performance and SEO out of the box.
advantages: Blazing fast static sites with optimized assets
Rich plugin ecosystem for extending functionality
GraphQL data layer unifies multiple data sources
Great image optimization with Gatsby Image
Progressive web app support built in
disadvantages: Build times can be slow for large sites
Less flexible than Next.js for dynamic content
